hooks.command: git rev-parse --git-dir | grep -q worktrees && git fetch origin master -q && git rebase --autostash origin/master -q || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && MISE_EXPERIMENTAL=true mise run //apps/knowledge_refinery:fmt "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && result=$(MISE_EXPERIMENTAL=true mise run //apps/knowledge_refinery:ty-file "$f" 2>&1) && exit 0 || echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"ty type check errors in $f:\n$result\"}}"; } 2>/dev/null || true
